reviews.comment:
La empleada del kiosco es muy amable y cordial.....los empleados playeros son también amables pero muuuuuy lentos para atender...por eso se forma mucha vola de autos......deberían agilizar a los playeros

(Translated by Google)
The kiosk employee is very kind and friendly...the gas station attendants are also friendly but veeeery slow to serve...that's why there's such a long line of cars...they should speed things up at the gas station.
